latest.notes: FTP Audio: mirror a remote FTP/FTPS server into a local folder and use it everywhere — an 'FTP Audio' picker, drag into logs, pre-name slots that pull the file when it airs, and three-lane overlap timing; works over the LAN. Plus: External/FTP timing is now the full three-lane editor and can be edited live in the Now Playing log, and the false 'unavailable' label on external elements is fixed (shows 'awaiting file' only when truly missing).
